request._assumptions: Highly speculative frontier wildcat: Pg 0.05 against a 160 MUSD deepwater well — designed so the (1-Pg) dry-hole charge drives EMV negative → NO_GO. Demonstrates the deterministic verdict on an uneconomic prospect. USER-SUPPLIED scenario.
